subcodes.first_line: Know thou that Mine Afnán made mention of thee before the Throne, until the sun of permission shone forth from the horizon of the Will of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلمی ان افنانی ذکرک تلقاء العرش الی ان اشرقت شمس الاذن من افق مشیه الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
